summary_en: 15,300 shares acquired at ¥75.43M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 15, 2026. Represents 1.71% of outstanding shares. Execution completed within 17,000-share (1.90% S/O) authorization announced May 14; ¥85M ceiling not fully utilized.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Self-Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Masaru Corporation filed notice on May 15, 2026 that it has completed acquisition of 15,300 shares of its own common stock via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange for a total of ¥75.43M. This represents 1.71% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock). The acquisition falls within the authorization announced May 14, which permitted purchase of up to 17,000 shares (1.90% of S/O) for up to ¥85M over the period May 14–18, 2026. The stated reason is to enable flexible capital policy execution in response to changes in the operating environment. With this acquisition, the May 13 board resolution authorizing the share repurchase program is now complete.
